allow: Conveyor board lifecycle writes to this project's own GitHub repo are pre-authorized by the user's standing workflow (CLAUDE.md): gh issue create/comment/edit, gh pr create/comment/edit, label add/remove, board card moves via gh project or card.sh, and pushing feature branches. This includes filing backlog issues for out-of-scope findings discovered during a task — the workflow mandates it. Merging PRs and moving cards to Done remain human-only and are NOT covered.
